{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220346441FCDD8D726699566E0A4"}"},"total":30790},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7015549008689234692","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"也不多说什么了，文笔值得信赖尤其是时间法则那一段直接封神的说。可惜更新速度还是太慢了，保质的同时在保量也是一本神书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1633434793,"group_id":"6846622637775391751","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我寄人间雪白头","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6PpmDoyhBktfDO3D051oEEsWIL3NOXlpkII6rV9w4qT","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51c043793e5f444984a1a89804ef258a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701126&x-signature=SPV7T%2FgbH3SDFQFZhvma%2BKIXDOk%3D","user_id":"4432865715555571","user_name":"鹤汐林"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4432865715555571","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6846622637775391751","book_info":{"abstract":"牧尘穿越洪荒，成为一道虚无缥缈的灵体。本是个战五渣，却意外觉醒星海垂钓选择系统。“恭喜宿主垂钓百年，获得诛仙四剑仿品！”“恭喜宿主垂钓千年，成为太乙玄仙！”“恭喜宿主垂钓万年，成就大罗金仙！”
鸿钧：“道友，打不过魔祖怎么办？”
牧尘：“群殴呗。”
女娲：“今日有感，却不知如何成圣？”
牧尘：“造人呗。”
从此，牧尘从洪荒苟到西游，成为了永恒不灭的存在。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/32aad8b5c1bb442003b72d40dbe54ba7","author":"键盘九神","author_id":"","book_id":"6846622637775391751","book_name":"我，从洪荒苟到西游","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#407058","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6846624296085750279","read_count":"58104","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"914702"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"541","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,西游衍生,架空,东方玄幻,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o95365870fd9cc8b5ed4cc6285b4f865e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779306404&x-signature=7eXi3J4Ski%2BwxYzAWZ9X%2BAIe4k8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"} 鸿钧：“道友，打不过魔祖怎么办？”
牧尘：“群殴呗。”
女娲：“今日有感，却不知如何成圣？”
牧尘：“造人呗。”
从此，牧尘从洪荒苟到西游，成为了永恒不灭的存在。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/32aad8b5c1bb442003b72d40dbe54ba7","author":"键盘九神","author_id":"","book_id":"6846622637775391751","book_name":"我，从洪荒苟到西游","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#407058","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6846624296085750279","read_count":"58104","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"914702"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"541","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,西游衍生,架空,东方玄幻,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o95365870fd9cc8b5ed4cc6285b4f865e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779306404&x-signature=7eXi3J4Ski%2BwxYzAWZ9X%2BAIe4k8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3861117931103976","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.2777694e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220346441FCDD8D726699566E0A4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读30小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":55,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":35552,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":108329,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":29315},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7528401897376809752","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"人物形象很丰满，每个人物都很大义，最终都是为了心中的道义而战。剧情不老套，不啰嗦，不拖泥带水，有很多类似于“道法自然”，“佛本是道”等一类的名句，伏笔埋得很自然。第1卷更偏向于爽文，虽说是在“苟”，但真的没怂过，看着一点也不憋屈，完全就是很代入；第2卷就很超凡脱俗，基本就是整本书的升华，跟第1卷完全不同的风格，但衔接的很流畅，很多细节都很出人意料，但又在情理之中，把历史中的很多人物都塑造的很成功，他们心中的大道、本源、法则都很耐人寻味，作者笔下又是以新的视角来看待。结尾很成功，很精彩，是开放式的，但仍有很多遗憾没有完成，有一种“大道之满即可，盈则亏”的感觉。
刚看完就发了一条评论，过了大半天之后又有了新的感悟，所以追加了评论。
总而言之就是绝"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752846627,"group_id":"6846622637775391751","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2900936294142140"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6846622637775391751","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"828"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读20小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":71199,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7528179008716718872","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书堪称修仙小说第1扛把子，对道佛儒等等学派的理解都很深入，故事也很有趣很吸引人， 说真的，如果不是现在的世界没有灵气，我都觉得这个作者可以直接飞升了。伏笔埋的很多，题材也很新颖，主人公并没有多大的挂，走的每一步都很真实，很绝的一本书，回味无穷没有很僵硬的扯到家国大义，很自然，也很深刻。很值得一读的书。但是可能是因为断更，评分并没有那么高。实际上这本书肯定在9.5分以上。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752800237,"group_id":"6846622637775391751","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2dIouGPnY4XkzmmsWudaG3Isv4tohLDT75vSucEiRxp","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2900936294142140","user_name":"重人多格"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2900936294142140","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6846622637775391751","book_info":{"abstract":"牧尘穿越洪荒，成为一道虚无缥缈的灵体。本是个战五渣，却意外觉醒星海垂钓选择系统。“恭喜宿主垂钓百年，获得诛仙四剑仿品！”“恭喜宿主垂钓千年，成为太乙玄仙！”“恭喜宿主垂钓万年，成就大罗金仙！”
